name: Tuna Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the dough into two halves. Roll out one half and line the bottom of a pie pan.
2. Blend the rest of the dough and pour it into the prepared pie crust.
3. Roll out the remaining dough, cover the filling, and crimp the edges.
4. Bake for 1 hour at 170°C.
